name: Bloomerang Nonprofit CRM API
what_it_does: Bloomerang REST API for nonprofit donor management and constituent relationship CRM. Enables AI agents to manage donor profiles and giving history, process donations and recurring gifts, track interactions and engagement scores, segment constituents for fundraising campaigns, and integrate donor data with email marketing and event management systems.
use_cases: Managing donor profiles and giving history from constituent relationship agents
Processing online donations and updating gift records from fundraising automation agents
Segmenting donors by engagement score for campaign targeting agents
Syncing constituent data with email marketing platforms from outreach agents
not_for: For-profit CRM without nonprofit fundraising and gift processing focus
Grant management without constituent relationship components
Membership associations without donation-focused fundraising workflows
best_when: A nonprofit organization using Bloomerang wants AI agents to automate donor outreach, update giving records, segment constituents for campaigns, and maintain accurate donor engagement data.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Donor personal and financial data requires careful handling. Automated communication must comply with CAN-SPAM and nonprofit communication regulations.

auth.notes: Bloomerang supports both API key (Bearer token) and OAuth 2.0. API keys available directly from settings. OAuth required for third-party integrations. Scopes control read/write access to different data types.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — nonprofit-focused SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Core, Pro, and Enterprise tiers based on constituent count; API on Pro and Enterprise
pricing.notes: Indianapolis-based company, founded 2012. Nonprofit-focused donor management. Acquired Kindful in 2021. API available on higher-tier plans.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests per 20 seconds per API key

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Donor personal and financial giving data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
100 requests per 20 seconds rate limit — implement throttling for bulk operations
API access only on Pro and Enterprise plans
US data residency only — verify for international nonprofit chapters
Engagement scores are Bloomerang-computed — understand scoring model before automating decisions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Donor personal and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth2. US data residency. Nonprofit data governance applies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Donor personal and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US-only data residency.
